panels.title: Service Availability %
panels.description: % of successful requests in last 1h. SLA target: 99.9%

targets.expr:
(
  sum(rate(traces_spanmetrics_latency_bucket{le="0.256", span_kind="SPAN_KIND_SERVER", service_name=~"$service"}[5m]))
  + (
    sum(rate(traces_spanmetrics_latency_bucket{le="1.024", span_kind="SPAN_KIND_SERVER", service_name=~"$service"}[5m]))
    - sum(rate(traces_spanmetrics_latency_bucket{le="0.256", span_kind="SPAN_KIND_SERVER", service_name=~"$service"}[5m]))
  ) / 2
) / sum(rate(traces_spanmetrics_latency_count{span_kind="SPAN_KIND_SERVER", service_name=~"$service"}[5m]))

panels.title: Services with Errors
panels.description: Number of services currently returning errors

panels.title: Services Breaching SLA
panels.description: Services with error rate > 1% or P95 latency > 2s

targets.expr: count((sum(rate(otel_traces_spanmetrics_calls_total{status_code="STATUS_CODE_ERROR", span_kind="SPAN_KIND_SERVER"}[5m])) by (service_name) / sum(rate(otel_traces_spanmetrics_calls_total{span_kind="SPAN_KIND_SERVER"}[5m])) by (service_name)) > 0.01 or histogram_quantile(0.95, sum(rate(otel_traces_spanmetrics_duration_milliseconds_bucket{span_kind="SPAN_KIND_SERVER"}[5m])) by (le, service_name)) > 2000) or vector(0)

panels.title: 🚨 Service Health Status — All Services at a Glance
panels.description: NOC view: one row per service showing current health. Red = needs attention.

panels.title: P50
panels.description: 50% of requests faster than this (typical experience)

panels.title: P95
panels.description: 95% of requests faster than this (slow users)

panels.title: P99
panels.description: 99% of requests faster than this (worst case)

panels.title: Service Map — Dependencies (DB, External, Internal)
panels.description: Shows how services call each other. Edge labels show request rate and latency.

panels.title: All Endpoints — Click Endpoint to Open Detail Dashboard
panels.description: Click any endpoint name to open the detailed drilldown dashboard

targets.expr: sum(rate(otel_traces_spanmetrics_duration_milliseconds_sum{span_kind="SPAN_KIND_SERVER", service_name=~"$service"}[5m])) by (service_name, span_name) / sum(rate(otel_traces_spanmetrics_duration_milliseconds_count{span_kind="SPAN_KIND_SERVER", service_name=~"$service"}[5m])) by (service_name, span_name)

sum(rate(otel_traces_spanmetrics_calls_total{status_code="STATUS_CODE_ERROR", span_kind="SPAN_KIND_SERVER", service_name=~"$service"}[5m])) by (service_name, span_name) / sum(rate(otel_traces_spanmetrics_calls_total{span_kind="SPAN_KIND_SERVER", service_name=~"$service"}[5m])) by (service_name, span_name) * 100

panels.title: Top 10 Slowest Endpoints (P95) — Click to Detail

targets.expr: topk(10, histogram_quantile(0.95, sum(rate(otel_traces_spanmetrics_duration_milliseconds_bucket{span_kind="SPAN_KIND_SERVER", service_name=~"$service"}[5m])) by (le, service_name, span_name)))

panels.title: Top 10 Highest Throughput — Click to Detail
Top Error Endpoints — Click to View Detail

targets.expr: sum(rate(otel_traces_spanmetrics_calls_total{status_code="STATUS_CODE_ERROR", span_kind="SPAN_KIND_SERVER", service_name=~"$service"}[5m])) by (service_name, span_name) / sum(rate(otel_traces_spanmetrics_calls_total{span_kind="SPAN_KIND_SERVER", service_name=~"$service"}[5m])) by (service_name, span_name) * 100

panels.title: Top Client IPs
panels.description: Requires http.client_ip attribute in spans. Captured by OTel Java/Python agent from incoming requests.

panels.title: Top User Agents
panels.description: Requires http.user_agent attribute in spans. Captured by OTel agent from incoming requests.

panels.title: Top External HTTP Calls (CLIENT spans)
panels.description: Outbound HTTP calls made by your services to external APIs

targets.expr: sum(rate(otel_traces_spanmetrics_calls_total{status_code="STATUS_CODE_ERROR", span_kind="SPAN_KIND_CLIENT", service_name=~"$service"}[5m])) by (service_name, span_name) / sum(rate(otel_traces_spanmetrics_calls_total{span_kind="SPAN_KIND_CLIENT", service_name=~"$service"}[5m])) by (service_name, span_name) * 100

panels.title: Top Database Queries (DB spans)
panels.description: DB calls captured by OTel JDBC/SQLAlchemy instrumentation. Shows db.statement attribute.

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.95, sum(rate(otel_traces_spanmetrics_duration_milliseconds_bucket{span_kind="SPAN_KIND_CLIENT", db_system=~".+", service_name=~"$service"}[5m])) by (le, service_name, span_name))
histogram_quantile(0.95, sum(rate(otel_traces_spanmetrics_duration_milliseconds_bucket{span_kind="SPAN_KIND_CLIENT", db_system=~".+", service_name=~"$service"}[5m])) by (le, service_name, span_name))
